name: memory-store
description: Memory Store skill pack for agent-native company-memory workflows. Includes LinkedIn Studio and Marketplace Operator.

interface.longDescription: Use Memory Store MCP as the context layer for agent-native workflows built by Memory Store. Includes LinkedIn Studio for turning company memory into public posts, and Marketplace Operator for maintaining the Memory Store plugin marketplace, scouting new Memory Store-backed plugin opportunities, and auditing whether skills or plugins need upgrades.
defaultPrompt: Act as our LinkedIn Studio. Find memory-backed post ideas and draft them in our voice.
Audit the Memory Store plugin marketplace and tell me what needs updating.
Record feedback on these drafts so Memory Store learns our brand voice, taste, and what performs.
